reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del playero que me vendió una garrafa le estaba dando plata de más y me lo devolvió muy honesto

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendant who sold me a gas canister was very helpful; I was giving him too much money and he gave it back to me—very honest.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfOWZYd1JnEAE

reviews.comment:
Fui ayer 20 de enero  ,mientras mi pareja estaba cargando combustible   yo fui a el baño a cambiarme,  mientras lo hacía la señora que limpia  pelo corto muy desagradable  empezó a decir , vamos saliendo rápido que hay gente esperando se vienen a cambiar acá,  y yo tengo que tener  todo limpio para los socios .
Todo perfecto  con eso , pero que no esté apurando a la gente porque yo estaba consumiendo,  por respeto no le dije nada
Pero es una maleducada
Que haga su trabajo y no comente por encima.

(Translated by Google)
I went yesterday, January 20th. While my partner was filling up the tank, I went to the restroom to change. While I was there, the woman who cleans with short hair, who was very unpleasant, started saying, "Let's get out of here quickly, there are people waiting to change, and I have to have everything clean for the members." That was fine, but she shouldn't be rushing people because I was making a purchase. Out of respect, I didn't say anything to her. But she's rude. She should do her job and not comment on things.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfdElQSHRnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Me cobraron como $20000 pesos de más no me di cuenta por qué iba apurado pero una estafa fue ayer turno noche de ayer.

(Translated by Google)
They charged me like $20,000 pesos more. I didn't realize why I was in a hurry, but a scam happened yesterday, the night shift.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfdmVUYkNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Soy socio. El señor canoso, gordito, alto con anteojos es muy arrogante y desagradable en el trato. Mi esposa le pidio una ficha para aire y le dijo que se le habían acabado las de socios, que pague si quiere una porque esas fichas son diferentes. Nada le costaba ir a abrir entonces la caja para sacar fichas. SERVICIO. De eso se trata ¿no?. NO VAYAN A ESA YPF. También fuimos a desayunar pero abre a las 9 am (¿????). Menos servicio ESA ESTACION DE SERVICIO.

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member. The gray-haired, chubby, tall man with glasses is very arrogant and unpleasant. My wife asked him for a token for air conditioning, and he told her they were out of the member tokens and that she'd have to pay if she wanted one because those tokens are different. It wouldn't have cost him anything to go open the cash register and get tokens. SERVICE. That's what it's all about, right? DON'T GO TO THAT YPF. We also went there for breakfast, but it opens at 9 am (????). That gas station has terrible service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMmRLOXNBRRAB
